subcodes.first_line: The Hidden One hath appeared, and the Concealed One hath been revealed, and the Speaker of Sinai hath spoken forth; yet the people hear not [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اتی المکنون و ظهر المستور و نطق مکلم الطور ولکن القوم هم لایسمعون قد
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
